      "text": "Ta pahrftaigaja tee Tez-

"

      "n": 11,

      "text": "Tatschn zitti no Ahsera

"
    },
    {
      "n": 12,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Ir eeksch Juhda bija
Deewa Rohka/ ka wiꞥſch teem
eenadu Sirđi derwe/ ka tee ta
ehnixa un to Leeu-Kungu Pa-

UNGGA Wahrdnu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 13,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un dauds Lauschn tapul-
inajahs Jerusaleme/ ka tee to

urretu ohtra Mehneti/ weena
varren leela Drandse.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 14,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Un tee zehlahs/ un at-

saleme bija/ un nehme wiﬀas
wehpjamas Leetas/ un mette
tohs Kihdranna Uppē.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 15,
      "column": "left",
      "text": "Tad nokawe tee to Passa-
(Jehru) ohtra Mehnefi zettorta-
vadeﬁnitā Deenā. Un tee Pree-
steri un Lewiti pratte Jawu Kan-
n/ un fwehtijahs/ un atwedde
tohs Dedfamo - Uppurus ta
KURGA Namna.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 16,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tee stahweja Jawd
kahrtā/ pehz winnu Teefin/ pehz
Mohsus ta Deewa Wihra Baus-
libas. Tee Preesteri flazztnaja
to Affini no to Lewitu Rohkas
(nemdami).
"
    },
    {
      "n": 17,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo dauds bija eeksch tahs
Draudses/ kas ne bij fwehtij-
schees/ tadeht nokawe tee Lewiti
tohs Passa-(Jehrus) preeksch
wisfeem/kas schkihsti ne btja/ka tee
tohs tam KUNGAH fwehtitu.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 18,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Jo leela Lauschn Drau-
dse/ dauds no Eewraima un no
Manaffus/ Jhsafchara un Se-
bulana/ne bij schkihstijfschees/tat-

bet ne ta ka rakstibhtsirr. Tomehr
luhdse Jskijus preeksch teem/ un
fazzija: Lat tas KUNGS/ kas
labs irr/ falihdsinahts tohp.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 19,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "(No ta) kas wiﬀa Jawā
Sirđi tafijces Deewu to KUN-
GU Jawo Tehwo Deewu mek-

"
    },
    {
      "n": 20,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un tas KUNGS paklan-

Faudis.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 21,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Ta turreja tee Israēta
Behrni/ kas Jerusaleme atrastt

Swehtkus feptinas Deenas ar

Preesteri flaweja to KUNGII ik-

ta KUNGA.
"
    },
    {
      "n": 22,
      "column": "right",
      "text": "Un Jskijus runnaja laip-

Ttttt 2
